auth.mfaRequired: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth.socialSignInUnavailable: Password sign-in is available now. Social sign-in will turn on after admin OAuth credentials are added.
auth.socialSignUpUnavailable: Email and password sign-up is available now. Social sign-in will turn on after admin OAuth credentials are added.
auth.acceptLegalBeforeAccount: Review and accept the Terms of Use and Legal Disclaimer before creating an account.
auth.acceptLegalBeforeProvider: Review and accept the Terms of Use and Legal Disclaimer before creating an account with {{provider}}.
auth.checkEmailDescription: We sent a verification link to {{email}}.
auth.requiredAcknowledgementsDescription: Accept these before creating your LocateFlow account.
auth.verifyEmail_body: We need to confirm your email before saving changes. Tap the link in your inbox, then come back here.
auth.verifyEmail_bodyFor: Saving {{context}} requires a verified email. Tap the link in your inbox, then come back here.
auth.verifyEmail_sentBody: We sent a fresh verification link to {{email}}.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening across your homes.
dashboard.upcomingBills_empty: No bills due in the next 7 days.

addresses.title: Addresses
addresses.emptyDescription: Add your first address to start tracking services.

services.title: Services
services.emptyDescription: Track every utility, bank, insurance, and subscription tied to your home.

moving.title: Moving
moving.checklistEmpty: Your checklist will appear here once you add services.

budget.title: Budget
budget.gate_subscriptionRequired_body: Creating and saving budgets needs an active LocateFlow subscription. You can still see this month's projections from the budget overview.

settings.title: Settings
settings.language_description: Choose your language. The app will use this everywhere.
settings.subscription_linkUnavailable: This billing link could not be opened on your device.
settings.subscription_a11yUpgradeHint: Opens secure checkout in your browser
settings.subscription_a11yRestoreHint: Syncs an existing subscription from your store account
settings.subscription_disclosureMonthly: Today: {{price}}. Renews monthly until you cancel in Settings.
settings.subscription_disclosureAnnual: Today: $0. Trial: 3 months. Your annual plan starts after the trial. Cancel before then in Settings.
settings.subscription_continueDisclosure:
{{disclosure}}

By continuing, you accept the subscription terms shown at checkout.
settings.subscription_nothingToRestoreDescription: No active subscription was found for this store account.

onboarding.goal_organize: I want to organize my services
onboarding.goal_save: I want to stop paying for things I forgot
onboarding.household_hint: Tap the ones that apply — all optional. We use these only to tailor your checklist.
onboarding.sensitive_hint: These fields are sensitive under US and EU privacy law. They're never required, never shared, and you can turn this off any time in Settings → Privacy.
onboarding.immigration_why: Why we ask: some states (CA, NY, WA) have different DMV document rules for new residents depending on visa status. Skip if it doesn't apply.
onboarding.moving_title: Do you have a move planned?
onboarding.moving_description: If yes, we'll generate a personalized checklist with tasks and deadlines. If not, you can add one any time from the Moving tab.
onboarding.moving_skipped: No problem! You can create a moving plan anytime from the Moving tab.
onboarding.error_namesRequired: First name and last name are required.
onboarding.error_legalRequired: You must accept the Terms of Use and Legal Disclaimer before continuing.
onboarding.error_addressRequired: Street, city, state and ZIP are required.
onboarding.error_stateFormat: State must be a 2-letter code (e.g. TX, NJ).
onboarding.error_addressMissing: No address found. Go back and add an address.
onboarding.error_destinationRequired: Please fill in destination city, state, ZIP, and move date.
onboarding.error_originMissing: No origin address found. Go back and add an address.
onboarding.error_planMissing: Moving plan could not be created.
onboarding.error_serviceIdMissing: Service saved but no service id was returned.
onboarding.error_planCleanup: Failed to clean up moving plan setup.
onboarding.error_completeOnboarding: Failed to complete onboarding. Please try again.
onboarding.error_onboardingIncomplete: Onboarding is not complete yet. Please review your profile and address information.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.section_push_hint: Delivered to this device. Requires the system permission.
notifications.email_taskReminders_desc: Get an email when an open task is due soon.
notifications.email_weeklyDigest_desc: Sunday recap of upcoming tasks and bills.
notifications.email_moveAlerts_desc: Important changes on your active moving plan.
notifications.push_taskReminders_desc: Push the same task reminders to this device.
notifications.push_streakReminders_desc: Nudges to keep your weekly checklist streak alive.
